description: Create a Classic Release Pipeline named 'Tailwind-CD' in the TailwindTraders project. Link the pipeline to the 'Tailwind-CI' build artifact and enable the Continuous Deployment trigger. The pipeline must consist of two sequential stages, 'Staging' followed by 'Production'. Each stage must include a PowerShell task running the inline script "Write-Host 'Deploying...'". Additionally, configure a pre-deployment approval for the 'Production' stage with the user 'Docker' assigned as the approver.
